personal_information.name: Caner Aslan
personal_information.summary: Since my childhood, I have always been curious about electronic devices and machines. I have a background in Information Technology and Computer Engineering, with a strong focus on embedded systems, Linux, and automotive electrical design. I enjoy researching new technologies and have experience in high-voltage (HV) and low-voltage (LV) wire harness systems.

experience.company: Nursan Kablo Donanımları San. Ve Tic A.Ş
highlights: Ensured compliance with IATF 16949 quality management and risk management.
Conducted IATF 16949 audit processes for Ford and Togg projects.
Managed Design FMEA studies and APQP processes.
Led task distribution and cross-training initiatives within the design team.
Managed lead times for Ford Cargo My16 and Togg Battery Harness projects.

experience.company: Nursan Kablo Donanımları San. Ve Tic A.Ş
highlights: Key role in HV and LV wire harness systems for Ford, Otokar, Togg, and Renault.
Contributed to 3D design, component selection (connectors, splices, wires) for Ford Cargo MY16/MY18/V769 and Togg battery designs.
Ensured safety and performance standards through component integration.
Active implementation and compliance with IATF 16949 standards.

experience.company: Nursan Kablo Donanımları San. Ve Tic A.Ş
highlights: Designed HV and LV harnesses for Ford Cargo and B460 projects.
Developed Java solutions for custom plugins in Capital/Vesys and Zuken applications.
Administered Capital/Vesys application settings, libraries, and data management.
Automated tasks and reporting using Microsoft Excel macros.
Established network data sharing and communication between devices.
Contributed to the 275 Doblo Mulletti project.
Designed electrical systems, including cable, socket, and terminal selection for LV wiring.
Performed 3D work on NX for connectors, bundles, and clips positioning.
Collaborated with teams to ensure quality and safety standards.
